surfacedError: node-08 oha invocation failed with 1; RuntimeError: warmup orchestration failed
rawAwsCliError: Connect timeout on endpoint URL: https://ssm.ap-northeast-2.amazonaws.com/
diagnosis: All eight SSM load commands were submitted exactly once. The local polling helper retried only OAuth2 rate-limit errors, so simultaneous transient SSM endpoint connect/read timeouts terminated every local observer. Promise.all surfaced node 08 first. Later exact-command reconciliation proved all remote commands successful and stopped. This is a local control-plane observation retry defect, not an observed workload failure.
acceptanceImpact: Worker artifacts and the aggregate warmup summary were not recovered. Throughput, response, transport and latency acceptance are untrustworthy; Attempt 15 fixes remain inconclusive.
fixDirection: Keep SendCommand one-shot. Add absolute-deadline bounded backoff and jitter only to read-only GetCommandInvocation and exact S3-to-local artifact recovery; fail identity, credentials, authorization and validation errors immediately and persist transient retry evidence.
